---
pagetitle: "Michael Lopez | Data & Place"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<!-- Hero Section with 3D Terrain -->
<div class="hero-container">
  <div id="terrain-canvas"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1 class="hero-name">Michael Lopez</h1>
    <p class="hero-title">Data Strategist | Civic Tech & Social Impact</p>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-indicator">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M12 5v14M19 12l-7 7-7-7"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
</div>
<script src="js/terrain.js"></script>

<!-- Introduction Section -->
<section class="intro-section">
  <h2>Building Data Systems That Help Communities</h2>
  <p>
    I design data infrastructure that turns administrative records into community action.
    With nearly six years in the nonprofit sector, I specialize in translating between
    technical teams and community stakeholders—building pipelines, dashboards, and tools
    that drive real-world impact in housing, public safety, and social policy.
  </p>
</section>

<!-- Projects Section -->
<section class="projects-section">
  <h2>Featured Work</h2>
  <div class="project-grid">

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="https://northtexasevictions.org" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="North Texas Evictions" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">North Texas Evictions</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Public-facing data transparency tool tracking eviction filings across Dallas County, helping residents and advocates understand displacement patterns.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Housing</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Public Data</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="https://digilab.cards" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="DigiLab TCG Standings" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7D6B 0%, #8B4D3B 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">DigiLab TCG Standings</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Shiny dashboard tracking Digimon card game tournament events in North Texas. Built a community around collaborative data collection.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Community</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Personal</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="https://github.com/lopezmichael/atomtemplates" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="atomtemplates R Package" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #C4724D 0%, #E8C496 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">atomtemplates</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            R package for standardized project creation and handling. Streamlines setup of new data projects with consistent structure and tooling.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">R Package</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Open Source</span>
            <span class="project-tag">DevTools</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="https://github.com/lopezmichael/digimon-tcg-standings" target="_blank">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Digimon TCG Standings Repo" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #5C4D45 0%, #5A7D6B 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Digimon TCG Standings (Source)</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Open source repository for the DigiLab standings tracker. Demonstrates Shiny app architecture and community-driven data pipelines.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">GitHub</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Open Source</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="resume.html">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="Dallas County Eviction Pipeline" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #8B4D3B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">Dallas County Eviction Pipeline</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Production data pipeline processing 40,000+ eviction records annually, serving 12+ partners including Dallas Eviction Advocacy Center and Eviction Lab.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Data Pipeline</span>
            <span class="project-tag">CPAL</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Impact</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

    <article class="project-card">
      <a href="resume.html">
        <img src="images/projects/placeholder.jpg" alt="30+ R Shiny Dashboards" class="project-image" onerror="this.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg, #5A7D6B 0%, #C4724D 100%)'; this.style.display='block';">
        <div class="project-content">
          <h3 class="project-title">30+ R Shiny Dashboards</h3>
          <p class="project-description">
            Suite of interactive dashboards at CPAL informing decisions on housing stability, public safety, resource allocation, and funding strategies.
          </p>
          <div class="project-tags">
            <span class="project-tag">Shiny</span>
            <span class="project-tag">CPAL</span>
            <span class="project-tag">Dashboards</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </article>

  </div>
</section>
```
